rulings.Case Title: BARBARA PATRICIA FEDUN VS. DAVID LOWE ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for December 04, 2019 line 3. DEFENDANT DAVID LOWE DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT Hearing Required to address whether Plaintiff is able to allege in good faith that she, in her individual capacity, is the "owner" within the meaning of Ellis Act. Plaintiff to provide copies (by no later than 8:30 a.m. on December 4, 2019 to the Court and the opposing party) of any new authorities Plaintiff introduces at the hearing as to the definition of the term "owner" as used in the Ellis Act and whether this term, as used, is inconsistent/different/more inclusive that the term "owner of record" and "owner" as used in the SFRO. =(501/REQ)
